subcodes.title: Words to Will and Wendell Dodge, spoken on 1901-11-21
subcodes.first_line: The Kingdom of God is likened unto a garden and the gardener is a blessed Manifestation. The gardener comes and finds the trees unfruitful and the garden in disorder.
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @power of the Manifestation of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
